title: Brand Pages — Convert existing Hizmetler sections to CardGroup
description:
Convert the existing "## Hizmetler" bullet-point link sections in 9 brand pages to Mintlify CardGroup/Card components.

Pages to modify:
- alarko.mdx (3 links: Tahliye İstasyonu, Hidrofor Sistemleri, Isı Pompaları)
- aldea.mdx (2 links: Isı Pompaları, Termosifonik Sistemler)
- aqualine.mdx (1 link: Su Arıtma Sistemleri)
- astral.mdx (3 links: Isı Pompaları, Pompalar, Sulama Sistemleri)
- atlantis.mdx (4 links: Tahliye İstasyonu, Hidrofor Sistemleri, Pompalar, Su Arıtma Sistemleri)
- atlas.mdx (4 links: Tahliye İstasyonu, Hidrofor Sistemleri, Pompalar, Su Arıtma Sistemleri)
- baymak.mdx (5 links: Tahliye İstasyonu, Hidrofor Sistemleri, Isı Pompaları, Pompalar, Termosifonik Sistemler)
- beser.mdx (1 link: Su Depoları)
- caleffi.mdx (4 links: Akıllı Oda Termostatları, Güneş Enerjisi Sistemleri, Mekanik Sıhhi Tesisat, Yerden Isıtma Sistemleri)

Replace each bullet-point list under ## Hizmetler with:
```
<CardGroup>
  <Card title="Service Name" icon="service-icon" href="/hizmetlerimiz/{slug}"></Card>
</CardGroup>
```

Use the existing su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx CardGroup/Card pattern as reference. DO NOT modify any "## 🌟 [emoji]" sections with external link-cards — those are external promotions and stay as-is.

This subtask is purely mechanical conversion — no research needed. The service links already exist in these pages.
summary: Completed FN-018: Converted Hizmetler bullet-point link sections to `<CardGroup>` / `<Card>` components across all 9 brand pages under `markalar/`. Created 27 service Card components total (alarko: 3, aldea: 2, aqualine: 1, astral: 3, atlantis: 4, atlas: 4, baymak: 5, beser: 1, caleffi: 4). All Cards are self-closing with no `icon` attribute. All `## 🌟` external-promotion sections and product detail content (baymak's `## Ürün Grupları`, atlantis's `## Atlantis Hidrofor Modelleri`, etc.) remain untouched. All 12 service page href targets verified as existing on disk. Zero leftover bullet-point link syntax. All tags properly opened and closed.

log.outcome: Well-structured, thorough specification for a mechanical markup conversion. All 9 target files exist and match the described content exactly. Each step shows concrete before/after content with explicit verification checkboxes. The reference pattern in `hizmetlerimiz/su-aritma-sistemleri.mdx` is confirmed and provides a clear template. The review level (0) and size (S) are appropriate for this single-pattern, no-risk conversion.
